issue_summary: Add CRC16 CITT, the most common variant.
javadoc_before: /** * CRC-16 checksum implementation based on polynomial {@code x16 + x^15 + x^2 + 1 (0x8005)} and the initial value {@code 0x0000}. This CRC variant is * also known as CRC-16-MODBUS. * * @see Cyclic redundancy check * @see Catalogue of parametrised CRC algorithms with 16 bits * @see On-line CRC calculation and free library * @see crccalc * @since 1.20.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * CRC-16 checksum implementation based on polynomial {@code x16 + x^15 + x^2 + 1 (0x8005)} and the initial value {@code 0x0000}. This CRC variant is * also known as CRC-16-MODBUS. *

* Since there are so many CRC-16 variants, we do not pick a default. *

* * @see Cyclic redundancy check * @see Catalogue of parametrised CRC algorithms with 16 bits * @see On-line CRC calculation and free library * @see crccalc * @since 1.20.0 */
